title: How Crocin turned a generic molecule into a household brand
excerpt: Paracetamol is a commodity any factory can make. So how did one brand own it for five decades? The full breakdown of Crocin's dual-brand strategy, the Dolo 650 disruption, and what it teaches about pharma brand strategy.

title: How drugs are priced in India — the real explanation
excerpt: DPCO, trade margins, and what your pharmacoeconomics textbook quietly skipped. Here is how drug pricing in India actually works.

title: FMCG vs pharma marketing — explained from scratch, no assumptions
excerpt: People keep saying pharma is just like FMCG with more rules. It is not. Here is the full breakdown of how the two industries actually work.

title: What I actually learned about pharma during my industrial training — and what nobody tells you
excerpt: Two months on a GMP manufacturing floor taught me more about the gap between pharma education and pharma reality than three years of textbooks ever did.
